name: Locus of Control
description: Chaos rages across the Gamma Quadrant and the tense intergalactic politics threaten to spill over into the rest of the galaxy. But the Alpha Quadrant isn't exactly stable itself and this moment may become a flashpoint for both quadrants.
rules:
-- Unique Bajoran, Cardassian, and Dominion Faction Missions are available during the event. Open the Event to access them.
-- Using any version of Ee'char, Colyus, Weyoun, or Explorers will provide a bonus to Event Faction Missions.
-- Every Event Faction Mission you succeed at earns you Event Victory Points. Collect Victory Points to unlock Event Threshold Rewards.
-- In this event, Squadrons may also compete to advance up the Squadron leaderboards. Join a Squadron to get more rewards!
bonus_text: Crew Bonus: Ee'char, Colyus, Weyoun, Explorers
rewards_teaser: Reach Rank 1 by gaining Victory Points from Event Missions!

featured_crew.name: Golin
featured_crew.flavor: The leader of the Ennis faction, doomed to eternal life and war with the Nol-Ennis on the moon.

action.name: When You Cease To Fear Death The Rules Of War Change

featured_crew.name: Colyus
featured_crew.flavor: Colyus investigated the disappearances of settlers, unaware that he and the others were holograms disappearing due to a broken projector.

action.name: I Have To Admit, I'm Starting To Get Desperate

featured_crew.name: Weyoun
featured_crew.flavor: A Vorta clone who oversaw a Jem'Hadar attack ship. Later killed after eradicating a Jem'Hadar rebellion.

rewards.name: Bajoran Transmission
rewards.flavor: Spent to acquire Bajoran faction missions.

rewards.name: Cardassian Union Transmission
rewards.flavor: Spent to acquire Cardassian faction missions.

rewards.name: Dominion Transmission
rewards.flavor: Spent to acquire Dominion faction missions.

rewards.name: Merits
rewards.flavor: Merits can be earned by completing missions. Use Merits to acquire faction-based rewards, upgrades to your ship, and more.

rewards.name: 10x S. Shuttle
rewards.flavor: 10 Standard Boosts. Go to Time Portal to collect!

rewards.name: Chronitons
rewards.flavor: Chronitons allow your crew to take action in these chaotic times. Use Chronitons to replay parts of past missions via the Timeline.

rewards.flavor: Credits are the galaxy's standard currency. Use Credits in the Time Portal to enlist crew members, build items, and more.

rewards.flavor: (Shuttle Missions Only) 2x rewards.

rewards.name: Credits
rewards.flavor: Credits are the galaxy's standard currency. Use Credits in the Time Portal to enlist crew members, build items, and more.

rewards.name: Honor
rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Voyage Revival
rewards.flavor: Use to instantly revive a failed Voyage.

rewards.name: 10x Portal
rewards.flavor: 10 valuable items. Go to Time Portal to collect!

rewards.name: Rarity
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 5 Polestars: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Super rare, Legendary

rewards.name: Skill
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 6 Polestars: Command, Diplomacy, Security, Engineering, Science, Medicine

rewards.name: ISM
rewards.flavor: ISM, or interstellar medium, is the matter that exists between astronomical objects. It can be manipulated by the Q to facilitate crew retrieval. ISM can be obtained from Daily Log-in Rewards, Campaigns and participating in Fleet activities.

rewards.name: Dilithium
rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.name: Rarity
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 5 Polestars: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Super rare, Legendary

rewards.name: Skill
rewards.flavor: Contains ONE of the following 6 Polestars: Command, Diplomacy, Security, Engineering, Science, Medicine

rewards.name: ISM
rewards.flavor: ISM, or interstellar medium, is the matter that exists between astronomical objects. It can be manipulated by the Q to facilitate crew retrieval. ISM can be obtained from Daily Log-in Rewards, Campaigns and participating in Fleet activities.

rewards.name: Dilithium
rewards.flavor: Dilithium is your most valuable asset. Use Dilithium in the Time Portal to acquire valuable crew members, items, and more.

rewards.name: Honor
rewards.flavor: Honor is gained by dismissing crew who have served you well, but are ready for reassignment. Redeem in the Time Portal for exclusive crew, special fusion-related items, training programs, and more.

rewards.name: Merits
rewards.flavor: Merits can be earned by completing missions. Use Merits to acquire faction-based rewards, upgrades to your ship, and more.

rewards.name: Training
rewards.flavor: Increases crew XP by 2500.

rewards.name: Golin
rewards.flavor: The leader of the Ennis faction, doomed to eternal life and war with the Nol-Ennis on the moon.

screens.text: "For so long, I did not understand even the nature of my own existence. But now to see what has become of the Dominion following the war, it is all too much. I fear for us - all of us."
"Yes. In the wake of such turmoil, it seems the most brutal, the most sinister among us are moving to grab power. And pushing beyond the bounds of the Gamma Quadrant."
"It would seem they have help from our side as well. We could use some help, Captain. We have a lot of ground to cover to ensure this destabilization of power doesn't get out of hand."
"For so long, I did not understand even the nature of my own existence. But now to see what has become of the Dominion following the war, it is all too much. I fear for us - all of us."
"Yes. In the wake of such turmoil, it seems the most brutal, the most sinister among us are moving to grab power. And pushing beyond the bounds of the Gamma Quadrant."
"It would seem they have help from our side as well. We could use some help, Captain. We have a lot of ground to cover to ensure this destabilization of power doesn't get out of hand."
"For so long, I did not understand even the nature of my own existence. But now to see what has become of the Dominion following the war, it is all too much. I fear for us - all of us."
"Yes. In the wake of such turmoil, it seems the most brutal, the most sinister among us are moving to grab power. And pushing beyond the bounds of the Gamma Quadrant."
"It would seem they have help from our side as well. We could use some help, Captain. We have a lot of ground to cover to ensure this destabilization of power doesn't get out of hand."
